meta.title: Observability Eval Full Parity Review
meta.description: Execution-ready parity plan for observability, telemetry, traces, evals, and benchmarks.

props.title: Observability Eval Full Parity Review
props.subtitle: 1:1 source-feature coverage, canonical non-duplicate implementation owners, and proof gates before production fanout.

props.content: This page is the review stop before execution. It preserves every observability, eval, telemetry, trace, and benchmark source row from the merged parity scorecard while collapsing duplicate platform concepts into canonical Lev capabilities.

props.title: Ready for review
props.content: Generated source map, capability map, task DNA, execution plan, and workstream capture. lev task validate reports ready=true with 28 slices, 84 failure hypotheses, and 84 fitness functions.

props.title: Not implemented yet
props.content: No capability is production-promoted by this page. Each capability still requires isolated worktree execution, PoC/spike evidence, production adapter evidence, test triad, Pentagon, UltraQA, and benchmark gates where applicable.

props.label: Execution Model
props.title: How duplicates collapse without losing source truth
Parity to promotion flow
props.content:
flowchart LR
  A[Parity scorecard] --> B[Generator check]
  B --> C[1:1 source map]
  B --> D[Canonical capability map]
  D --> E[28 isolated capability slices]
  E --> F[PoC and production adapter]
  F --> G[Test triad]
  G --> H[Pentagon and UltraQA]
  H --> I[Review before exec fanout]

props.label: Capability Owners
props.title: The 28 non-duplicate implementation targets
props.subtitle: Each row is a canonical capability slice; platforms remain traceability, not implementation ownership.

props.title: Recommended next action
props.content: Review the 28 capability owners and the 526 source-row assignments. Execution should start only after accepting this map as the controlling plan.
